action: Fix Figure 8: Remove PMP-WD data points, recompute rho/p-values with 7 paper methods only, rename file from theorem2_validation.png to alignment_analysis.png
impact: critical -- desk-reject-level error showing undescribed method data

action: Fix Figure 4: Debug BEM values in regenerate_figures.py so half_lambda appears at BEM=0.500, not BEM~0.0. Visually verify after regeneration.
Change title from 'Why Dynamic Weight Decay Methods Are Equivalent' to 'When' or remove 'Why'. The paper does not prove causation.
impact: critical -- overclaiming in title is a reviewer red flag

action: Revise abstract to accurately describe partial factorial design (84 ResNet-20 fully crossed + 21 VGG-16-BN targeted) instead of implying full 2x2x2x7x3 crossing.
Add power caveat to abstract and conclusion: 'equivalent within our detection threshold of ~0.7%' or similar qualification.
impact: major -- absence of evidence framed as evidence of absence

action: Demote CSI from contributions list (Section 1.3) to 'exploratory diagnostic'. Reduce CSI discussion in Section 5.5. Free space for BEM/AIS which have interpretable results.
impact: major -- inflating a non-predictive metric wastes reviewer patience

action: Fix Section 5.7: Remove directional claim about |Delta rho|=0.424. Replace with 'neither measure predicts generalization gap in our sample.'
Add 2 seeds (N=5) for key comparisons: constant vs {cwd_hard, cosine_schedule, no_wd, swd} on CIFAR-10 AdamW. Cost: 8 runs, ~2 GPU-hours.
impact: major -- improves power from 0.7% to ~0.4% detection threshold

action: Diagnose ImageNet failure (5th iteration). SSH smoke test first, then run constant + cwd_hard + no_wd x 3 seeds = 9 runs on ResNet-50.
impact: critical -- project constraint violation, venue credibility

action: Update proposal.md to match empirical-only paper scope. Remove Lyapunov, PMP, Theorems 1-4, controller taxonomy references.
impact: major -- prevents planner/critic penalizing scope gap

action: Either expand non-BN ablation to all 7 methods or remove the contradictory 2/7 results from Section 6.2.
impact: major -- current results contradict the BN-mechanism hypothesis

action: Add explicit D'Angelo et al. (2024) contrast paragraph in Related Work: they show WD doesn't regularize; we show dynamic modulation is additionally irrelevant under AdamW.
